L.-33004/99 , 1935 dk 33½ ¼ftls blesa blds i'pkr~~~ mDr ] [kaM 3] mi&[kaM (ii) esa rkjh[k 16 uoEcj] 2010 }kjk rkjh[k 16 uoEcj] 2010 dks egknk;h ty ½ dk xBu vUrjjkfT;d egknk;h unh vkSj mldh unh /kdj.k ls viuh fjiksVZ vkSj fofu'p; dks rhu o"kZ vof/k ds Hkhrj izLrqr ugha dj ldk gS c<+kus dk vuqjks/k fd;k gS; dsUnzh; ljdkj dks vof/k dks nks o"kZ ls vuf/kd /kkjk ¼2½ ds ijarqd }kjk iznÙk 'kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs 16 uoEcj] 2013 ls ,d o"kZ dh [Qk- la- 19@4@2010&ch-,e-] mfoZyk [kkrh] Lka;qDr lfpo ¼ihih½ -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th November, 2013 S.O. 3404(E).—Whereas, the Mahadayi Water Disputes Tribunal (hereinafter referred to as the said Tribunal) was constituted on the 16th November, 2010 vide notification number S.O. 2786(E), dated the 16th November, 2010 published in Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) of the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, dated the 16th November, 2010, under Section 4 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956) (hereafter referred to as the said Act) for the adjudication of the water disputes relating to the Inter-State River Mahadayi and the river valley thereof; And whereas the said Tribunal is required to submit its report and decision under sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act within a period of three years, i.e. on or before the 15th November, 2013; And whereas, due to unavoidable reasons, the said Tribunal is unable to submit its report within the said period of three years and has requested the Central Government to extend the period of submission of its report and decision; And whereas, under the proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government has power to extend the period for a further period not exceeding two years; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby extends the period of submission of report and decision by the Mahadayi Water Disputes Tribunal for a further period of one year with effect from the 16th November, 2013. [F. No. 19/4/2010-BM] URVILLA KHATI, Jt. Secy. (PP) Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
